subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise ye God that ye have been enabled to attain His most great guidance and have drawn nigh unto the sacred threshold of the Lord of Lords [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ياران الهی عبدالبهاء ، حمد کنيد خدا را که موفّق بهدايت کبری گشتيد و بآستان مقدّس ربّ الارباب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @law of pilgrimage, @bringing forth results; fruit, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
